title: AI Lead Rescue process flow
description: Three-stage geometric flow illustration anchoring the 'how it works' section on the AI Lead Rescue page. Represents the operational loop: capture → alert → log and summarise. Hand-crafted SVG, deterministic, brand-aligned.

licence.terms: Original CorpFlowAI mark. Free to reuse across CorpFlowAI surfaces; do not redistribute as stock or use in third-party marketing without written agreement.

accessibility.alt: Three-stage process diagram showing the AI Lead Rescue loop: capture a new enquiry, alert the owner or operator, and log the lead with a daily summary on a follow-up board.

usage.notes: slot:lead_rescue_process. Anchors the 'how it works' section above the three step cards. Pure SVG, ~3 KB on the wire.
